ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Work class of the individual (foreign key to workclasses) */,
  "fnlwgt" INTEGER /* Final weight of the individual */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Education level of the individual (foreign key to educations) */,
  "educationnum" INTEGER /* Numerical representation of education level */,
  "maritalstatus_id" INTEGER /* Marital status of the individual (foreign key to maritalstatuses) */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Occupation of the individual (foreign key to occupations) */,
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Relationship status of the individual (foreign key to relationships) */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Race of the individual (foreign key to races) */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Sex of the individual (foreign key to sexes) */,
  "capitalgain" INTEGER /* Capital gain of the individual */,
  "capitalloss" INTEGER /* Capital loss of the individual */,
  "hoursperweek" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week by the individual */,
  "nativecountry_id" INTEGER /* Native country of the individual (foreign key to nativecountries) */,
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Income level of the individual (foreign key to incomes) */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., survey, census) */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the data (1-10 scale) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_workclass_id FOREIGN KEY ("workclass_id") REFERENCES workclasses ("workclass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_maritalstatus_id FOREIGN KEY ("maritalstatus_id") REFERENCES maritalstatuses ("maritalstatus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES educations ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_nativecountry_id FOREIGN KEY ("nativecountry_id") REFERENCES nativecountries ("nativecountry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_income_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_id") REFERENCES incomes ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_relationship_id FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_id") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workclasses" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work class */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the work class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the work class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educations" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maritalstatuses" (
  "maritalstatus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "maritalstatus_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maritalstatus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the occupation */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry category of the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship status */,
  "relationship_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the relationship status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sex */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nativecountries" (
  "nativecountry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each native country */,
  "nativecountry_name" TEXT /* Name of the native country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the native country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the country belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nativecountry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incomes" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income level */,
  "income_name" TEXT /* Name of the income level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the income level */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Income range for the level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
